column1: 1932 Continuation record for Shalford Clonkeen 1927-1928 only
1938 Dec Part estimated due to snow
1940 Aug Observer set up a second gauge 3.5 years ago in more sheltered site as a check on gauge from which readings are supplied
Record 1932-39 probably 1-2in too small due to over exposure
1941 Observer informed catch low due wind eddies 1-2in deficiency each year
2nd gauge showed 33% increase with SW winds
1959 Terminated No longer wishes to cooperate
A 1971 note on sheet says NGR TQ000474 changed to TQ002464 as exact location doubtful but must be 464 on these directions
In fact The Hutch was at NGR TQ0060046550
